title: Kompaz | AI Founder Alignment Diagnostic
source_name: follow-builders cloud fallback / keyword search / Anysearch
full_text:
Kompaz | AI Founder Alignment Diagnostic
Founder–Cofounder Fit (Alignment MVP)
Diagnose cognitive drift before it breaks your startup
Kompaz is an AI‑native spoken diagnostic that maps founder cognition in real time—surfacing alignment, role misfit, and decision‑making breakdowns before they show up in execution.
Founder‑owned data
Built for teams & investors
Alignment & Drift Map — Demo
CQ
72
MCI
64
CCI
68
Drift risk Moderate
Early divergence between role claims and cognition under stress.
Startups scale faster than alignment
Drift forms silently in the founding team before metrics show it. Catch it at the root.
Investors want predictive diligence
Leadership quality is invisible until damage is done. Make it measurable and comparable.
Founder‑positive by design
Consent, revocable sharing, and founder‑owned data ensure adoption and trust.
How it works
Run a 10–12 minute spoken diagnostic. We score cognition, map alignment, and flag role‑fit issues with clean visual reports founders can share with investors.
Speak
Guided prompts capture live thinking under ambiguity.
Score
Proprietary indices compute cognition quality and role coherence.
Align
View Alignment & Drift Maps across cofounders and roles.
What we score
CQ
Cognition Quotient
Range & abstraction capacity.
MCI
Meta‑Cognition Index
Awareness & regulation of thinking.
CCI
Cognitive Competence Index
Application to role‑specific contexts.
CDL
Cognition Development Ladder
Stage of cognitive maturity over time.
Signals you get
Alignment & Drift Maps
See where founders sync and where divergence risks execution.
Identity–Role Fit
Flag coherence between role claims (visionary/operator/fundraiser) and cognition.
Investor‑shareable Summary
Founder‑controlled artefacts for predictive diligence.
AES‑256 encryption · TLS 1.3 · Explicit consent & revocable sharing
Built to deepen over time
We start with Alignment MVP and expand to session telemetry, longitudinal tracking, and developmental pathways—turning Kompaz from a diagnostic into cognitive infrastructure.
v1 — Alignment MVP
Founder check

Role fit

Telemetry under tension

Founder‑positive: you control what to share and with whom.
Founder Check
₹9,900
Single founder diagnostic & report
CQ/MCI/CCI/CDL scores
Personal report
Investor‑shareable summary
Cofounder Fit (Team of 2–3) Popular
₹24,900
Alignment & Drift Map for teams
Team heatmap & fit map
Role‑fit signals
Live readout session (30 min)
Portfolio Pilot
Custom
For accelerators & funds
Cohort onboarding
Portfolio dashboard beta
Diligence artefacts
FAQ
What exactly is the Founder Check?
A 10–12 minute spoken diagnostic that computes core cognition indices and produces a founder‑shareable summary.
Is my data private?
Yes. Data is encrypted (AES‑256 in transit/at rest). You control what is shared and can revoke access anytime.
Can investors use this for diligence?
Yes. We provide an investor‑shareable artefact and (optionally) a live readout session for teams.
Does this replace traditional interviews?
No. It augments them by quantifying cognition and alignment signals that are otherwise invisible early on.
